title: Adventures Of The TARDIS: Regenerated
description: A fun pack centered around AIT (Adventures In Time) and the TARDIS from Doctor Who!
body:
# Pack Features
- TARDISes from the sci-fi TV show Doctor Who

- Technology & equipment to help you explore the various biomes and dimensions

- Space & Planets to travel to via rocket or TARDIS

- Overhauled End & Nether dimension for more immersion

- A public server to interact & play with other users of the pack
## Other Information
You should download this pack if you want a fun Doctor Who based modpack filled with fun, adventure, and if you're a fan of tech & magic mods
## Server Info

```
IP: [Server currently inactive]
Server name: Hollow SMP
Misc. info: Discord invite available via link on Modrinth page
Anyone found to be using hacks, cheats, or other exploits on the server should be reported to
the Moderation team & will be dealt with according to the severity of their actions.
```
